rows.label: tev026101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Dorothy if anything is on her mind.

rows.label: tev026101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Dorothy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev026101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Dorothy about Blue Bloods.

rows.label: tev026101_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Dorothy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0001
rows.name:
When you're picking out your BLADE wear,
don't let appearances steer you wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0002
rows.name:
I found the most darling headgear and decided to order
a sample, but when I tried it on, I could feel it sucking
the energy right out of me. Awful merchandise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Who cares how equipment looks if wearing it's
literally a drag? Navigating fashion doesn't get
any easier on a new planet, I'll tell you what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0051
rows.name:
Now that you mention it, I noticed this
BLADE lurking around the shop a while
back, although he never came inside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0052
rows.name:
I wonder if he was too embarrassed?
Regardless, I haven't seen him in a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0053
rows.name:
I've been talking with Liviana to see if we
can make our shop more unisex. I doubt the
boss wants to lose any potential customers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0101
rows.name:
Did you know you're allowed
to ask for bells and whistles
when you make a Blue Blood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0102
rows.name:
So if you want, you can erase a
beer belly or say so long to wrinkles
that have always bothered you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0103
rows.name:
There's even a rumor going around that some
people managed to get Blue Bloods that look
much younger than their actual age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0104
rows.name:
Still, it's not really a big deal. I mean, we'll all
be back in our real bodies eventually, right? Let the
would-be butterflies have their moment, I guess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0151
rows.name:
Now that you mention it, I noticed this
BLADE lurking around the shop a while
back, although he never came inside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0152
rows.name:
I wonder if he was too embarrassed?
Regardless, I haven't seen him in a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0153
rows.name:
Oh, and he had a Pathfinder
insignia on his shoulder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0154
rows.name:
If you know the guy, could you
tell him he's welcome to stop in?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0351
rows.name:
For the longest time, I was
scared of finding the Central
Life and getting my body back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0352
rows.name:
I mean, think about it. Blue
Bloods don't age. You can stay
forever young if you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0353
rows.name:
But the more I talk to Shingo,
the more I warm up to the idea
of leaving this shell.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0354
rows.name:
With real bodies, he and I can
grow old together. And that's
an incredibly beautiful thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0401
rows.name:
You know, when you think about it, it's
scary. Blue Bloods never age, and any damage
can be wiped away like it never happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0402
rows.name:
And yet we do the same things day after day,
which ultimately runs the risk of stagnation.
Oh, and we can't have children, either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0403
rows.name:
I'm basically trapped in time
until we find the Central Life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0404
rows.name:
We can't keep living like this.
We just can't. Promise me
you'll find the Core soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0451
rows.name:
Shingo's dead... I heard
from another BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0452
rows.name:
He told me that Blue Bloods were
supposed to be impossible to kill
like that. What happened?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0453
rows.name:
Part of me wants to go to the Central
Life the second we find it so I can
be there when he comes back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026101_MSG0454
rows.name:
Maybe he'll be mad at me for
not staying in the city where
it's safe, but I don't care.[ST:wait ]
